name: Sheer Lace Bodysuit
description: A study in transparency and restraint. This sheer lace bodysuit features hand-finished scalloped edges, a plunge neckline, and a snap closure. Cut from the finest French lace, it drapes the body like a second skin — revealing just enough to captivate.

name: Silk Charmeuse Robe
description: Languorous and deeply sensual, this silk charmeuse robe falls to mid-thigh with a generous lapel and sash tie. The liquid drape of pure silk against skin is an experience unto itself. Available in midnight noir.

name: Venetian Lace Bralette Set
description: A matching bralette and high-waist brief in intricate Venetian lace. Underwired for gentle support, with delicate floral motifs that bloom across the bust. The kind of set you wear for yourself, first.

name: Velvet Sensory Blindfold
description: Crafted from double-layered plush velvet with an adjustable silk ribbon tie. This refined blindfold heightens every sense it obscures. An elegant invitation to surrender to the moment.

name: Midnight Mesh Teddy
description: Ultra-fine stretch mesh in deep midnight black. This teddy skims every curve with barely-there coverage, finished with satin binding at the leg and a G-string back. Minimal. Mesmerising.

name: Rosette Satin Chemise
description: A bias-cut satin chemise that cascades from adjustable spaghetti straps to a deep side slit hem. The champagne rose satin catches light like candlelight. Wear alone or beneath an evening coat — both are equally compelling.

name: Luxe Wand Massager
description: A premium personal wellness wand with whisper-quiet motor, 10 intensity settings, and a contoured silicone head. Rechargeable, waterproof, and designed for the discerning. Packaged discreetly in a lacquered gift box.

name: Black Lace Garter Set
description: A three-piece set comprising a lace garter belt, matching bralette, and G-string brief. All-over Chantilly lace in classic black. Four adjustable suspenders with chrome hardware. Timeless.

name: Satin Restraint Ribbons
description: Four lengths of heavyweight satin ribbon — each 200cm long and 5cm wide — finished with hand-sewn loop ends. Soft enough to lie against skin all night, strong enough to hold a moment. Presented in a silk pouch.

name: Couples Vibrating Ring
description: Engineered for shared pleasure — a flexible, rechargeable vibrating ring with dual motors. Ultra-stretchy premium silicone. 12 vibration patterns, whisper-quiet, fully waterproof. For those who believe intimacy is a collaboration.

name: Lace Corset Bustier
description: A structured lace corset with steel boning, modesty panel, and back lace-up closure. The silhouette it creates is nothing short of architectural. Wear with high-waist briefs or alone as a statement piece.

name: Sensual Massage Candle Trio
description: Three hand-poured soy massage candles in amber, rose absolute, and sandalwood. Low-melt-point formula transforms to warm massage oil on contact with skin. Burn time 30 hours each. Comes in a signature La'Fai gift box.
